name: well-architected review: cites grounding source ids in the markdown brief
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "resilient multi-region platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
grep -q aws-well-architected out/2026-06-08T120000Z.md && echo cited 1>&2
